About.title: We're building the future of
About.desc: Udarsy was built on a simple belief: every student deserves access to world-class education — regardless of where they live.
About.mission_desc: Too many students are held back not by their abilities, but by a lack of access to good resources. Udarsy changes that. We create interactive, curriculum-aligned content that makes it possible for any student to excel.
About.v1_desc: Every feature we build is rooted in a single goal — making quality education accessible to every student, everywhere.
About.v2_desc: We constantly push the boundaries of how learning can be delivered, mixing AI with interactive content.
About.v3_desc: Students are at the heart of every decision. We listen, learn and iterate based on real feedback.
About.v4_desc: Available in multiple languages and designed for every culture, Udarsy is built for the whole world.
About.m1_desc: Udarsy was born out of a shared frustration — quality education felt out of reach for many students.
About.m2_desc: Word spread quickly. Within months, students across Morocco were using Udarsy to prepare for exams.
About.m3_desc: We partnered with 20 schools across the Kingdom, reaching 10,000 active users.
About.m4_desc: Udarsy now serves students across the Moroccan kingdom and beyond, ensuring quality education for all.
About.m5_desc: Launched personalized AI learning paths that adapt to every student's individual pace and style.
About.m6_desc: Launching our iOS and Android apps and aiming to become the leading digital education hub in Africa, reaching 1 million learners.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.intro: At Udarsy, your privacy is important to us. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information when you use our platform.
Privacy.s1_content:
We collect information you provide directly when you create an account, such as your name, email address, password, and profile picture. We also collect information about how you use Udarsy, including lessons accessed, time spent learning, quiz results, and progress data.

We may automatically collect certain information when you visit our platform, such as your IP address, browser type, device type, and usage patterns through cookies and similar technologies.
Privacy.s2_content:
We use the information we collect to:
• Provide, operate, and improve the Udarsy platform
• Personalize your learning experience and recommendations
• Track your progress and award achievements
• Communicate with you about updates, features, and promotions
• Process payments for premium subscriptions
• Comply with legal obligations and protect user safety
Privacy.s3_content:
We do not sell your personal information to third parties. We may share your information with:
• Service providers who assist in operating our platform (e.g., hosting, analytics, payment processors)
• Law enforcement or government authorities when required by law
• Other parties with your explicit consent

All third-party service providers are bound by confidentiality agreements and are not permitted to use your data for any purpose beyond providing services to Udarsy.
Privacy.s10_content:
If you have any questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us:

Email: privacy@udarsy.io
Address: Rabat, Morocco

We aim to respond to all privacy-related inquiries within 5 business days.
